positive: A whimsical, stylized celestial map featuring interconnected glowing constellations and mythical forest spirits. The central elements include a silhouette of a crescent moon embracing a grouping of stylized, bioluminescent flowers and vines. Scattered across the background are abstract cosmic dust clouds and elegant, winding astral lines, all rendered in a neo-art nouveau style. Color palette is deep indigo, ethereal lavender, metallic gold, and soft sage green, emphasizing strong contrast between the dark space and the glowing subject matter. Designed for apparel print, with clean edges and high visual impact. Minimalist composition, centered, highly detailed.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, messy, blurred, grainy, noise, artifact, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, duplicate, low resolution, realistic photo, photograph
